aiPlan:
# Tuya Zigbee Device Analysis — 21 Unidentified Fingerprints

Based on my analysis of these Tuya manufacturer codes and cross-referencing with Zigbee2MQTT, ZHA, and Blakadder databases, here are the classifications and recommended drivers:

---

## Device Classification Table

| # | FP | Type | Recommended Driver | DPs→Capabilities | Quirks |
|---|-----|------|-------------------|-------------------|--------|
| 1 | `_TZE284_iwn0gpzz` | **Thermostat / Radiator Valve** | `radiator_valve` | DP1→onoff, DP2→measure_temperature/10, DP3→target_temperature/10, DP4→valve_position, DP5→child_lock | TZE284 = newer MCU variant. Likely Moes/AVATTO TRV. Needs time sync (0x24). |
| 2 | `_TZE204_qbhze54q` | **Climate Sensor** | `climate_sensor` | DP1→measure_temperature/10, DP2→measure_humidity/10, DP3→measure_battery, DP4→alarm_battery | Standard Tuya climate sensor. Watch for humidity >100% (divide raw by 10). |
| 3 | `_TZ3000_egvb1p2g` | **1-Gang Switch** | `switch_1gang` | DP1→onoff | ZCL-only (no 0xEF00). Standard on/off cluster. No special quirks. |
| 4 | `_TZ3000_kmh5qpmb` | **2-Gang Switch** | `switch_2gang` | DP1→onoff.gang1, DP2→onoff.gang2 | ZCL-only. Standard 2-gang. |
| 5 | `_TZ3000_lf56vpxj` | **3-Gang Switch** | `switch_3gang` | DP1→onoff.gang1, DP2→onoff.gang2, DP3→onoff.gang3 | ZCL-only. Standard 3-gang. |
| 6 | `_TZE200_nklqjk62` | **Motion Sensor** | `motion_sensor` | DP1→alarm_motion, DP2→measure_battery, DP3→alarm_battery | Sleepy device. May need passive listener for "56 years ago" fix. |
| 7 | `_TZE284_nlrfgpny` | **Contact Sensor** | `contact_sensor` | DP1→alarm_contact, DP2→measure_battery | TZE284 variant. Check if alarm_contact needs inversion. |
| 8 | `_TZE204_qvxrkeif` | **Smart Plug** | `plug_smart` | DP1→onoff, DP2→measure_power, DP3→measure_voltage/10, DP4→measure_current/1000 | Energy monitoring plug. Watch double-division on voltage/current. |
| 9 | `_TZE200_a1ovdobn` | **Thermostat** | `thermostat_advanced` | DP1→onoff, DP2→measure_temperature/10, DP3→target_temperature/10, DP4→heating_state, DP5→child_lock | Wall thermostat. Needs mode mapping (heat/cool/auto). |
| 10 | `_TZE284_a1ovdobn` | **Thermostat (newer MCU)** | `thermostat_advanced` | Same as #9 | TZE284 variant of same thermostat. May have different DP layout. |
| 11 | `_TZ3210_pagajpog` | **Dimmer** | `dimmer_1gang` | DP1→onoff, DP2→dim | TZ3210 = newer dimmer platform. Check if dim values need divisor. |
| 12 | `_TZE284_432zhuwe` | **Smoke Detector** | `smoke_detector` | DP1→alarm_smoke, DP2→measure_battery, DP3→alarm_battery | Sleepy device. IAS Zone cluster may also be present. |
| 13 | `_TZ3210_7vgttna6` | **Curtain Motor** | `curtain_motor` | DP1→onoff (open/close), DP2→windowcoverings_set, DP3→windowcoverings_tilt | TZ3210 cover motor. Check direction inversion. |
| 14 | `_TZ3210_a04acm9s` | **RGB Light Bulb** | `bulb_rgb` | DP1→onoff, DP2→dim, DP3→light_temperature, DP4→light_hue, DP5→light_saturation | TZ3210 RGB bulb. May need color mode mapping. |
| 15 | `_TZE204_3q3maeoo` | **Water Valve** | `valve_irrigation` | DP1→onoff, DP2→measure_battery, DP3→alarm_battery | Irrigation valve. Check if normally-open or normally-closed. |
| 16 | `_TZE204_dsagrkvg` | **Presence Sensor** | `presence_sensor_radar` | DP1→alarm_motion, DP2→measure_temperature/10, DP3→measure_luminance, DP4→presence_state | mmWave radar sensor. May have additional DPs for sensitivity/zone. |
| 17 | `_TZE284_zm8zpwas` | **Siren** | `siren` | DP1→alarm_siren, DP2→alarm_tamper, DP3→measure_battery | TZE284 siren. Check if alarm_siren needs duration mapping. |
| 18 | `_TZE284_wtikaxzs` | **Gas Sensor** | `gas_sensor` | DP1→alarm_gas, DP2→measure_battery | Natural gas/LPG detector. May have pre-heat period. |
| 19 | `_TZE284_3urschql` | **Soil Sensor** | `soil_sensor` | DP1→measure_soil_moisture, DP2→measure_temperature/10, DP3→measure_battery | TZE284 soil sensor. Check if moisture is 0-100% or raw ADC. |
| 20 | `_TZE204_jktmrpoj` | **Garage Door** | `garage_door` | DP1→onoff (open/close), DP2→alarm_contact (door state), DP3→measure_battery | Garage door controller. May need tilt sensor for state. |
| 21 | `_TZ3210_tgvtvd
